checks.name: production_environment_for_pythia_startup
checks.summary: production environment permits live PYTHIA startup autonomy

checks.name: dev_fixtures_disabled_for_pythia_startup
checks.summary: development fixtures are disabled for live PYTHIA mining startup

checks.name: pythia_startup_autonomy_allowed
checks.summary: PYTHIA startup autonomy is allowed as internal production behaviour

checks.name: autonomous_external_action_authorisation
checks.summary: autonomous external actions are disabled or explicitly approved

checks.name: autonomous_runtime_bounds
checks.summary: autonomous bounds are within configured production limits

checks.name: live_share_submit_authorisation
checks.summary: live share submit is either disabled or explicitly approved

checks.detail: operator approval ID missing; this is acceptable for PYTHIA startup autonomy, but not for autonomous external actions or separately approved live share submission
checks.name: autonomous_audit_evidence
checks.summary: autonomous audit evidence has advisory gaps

next_operator_actions: PYTHIA may boot, heal, optimise, check APIs/pool readiness, and run the mining startup/search path under command-room observation.
Monitor subscribe -> authorize -> notify -> search -> local validate -> submit gate -> pool ACK when share submission is enabled and approved.
Keep HYBA_AUTONOMOUS_EXTERNAL_ACTIONS=false unless a human approval ID/operator/reason is attached.
HYBA_ENABLE_LIVE_SHARE_SUBMIT=true is permitted when HYBA_LIVE_SHARE_APPROVAL_ID is present and audit logging is enabled.
